name: Zhejiang Henglin Chair Industry CO., LTD.
summary: Zhejiang Henglin Chair Industry CO., LTD. engages in the research and development, production, and sale of office chairs, sofas, massage chairs, and accessories in China. It also exports its products to approximately 80 countries and regions. The company was formerly known as Zhejiang Henglin Chair Industry Ltd. and changed its name to Zhejiang Henglin Chair Industry CO., LTD. in December 2007. Zhejiang Henglin Chair Industry CO., LTD. was founded in 1998 and is based in Huzhou, China.
